description: Hard hat missing — worker in active work zone without head protection
Hi-vis vest missing — worker near mobile equipment or roadway without high-visibility garment
Safety glasses missing — worker performing grinding, cutting, or drilling without eye protection
Gloves missing — worker handling sharp materials, chemicals, or rough surfaces without hand protection
Steel-toe boots missing — worker in active area wearing sneakers, sandals, or non-protective footwear
Unguarded leading edge — open perimeter edge at elevation without guardrail or warning line
Missing guardrail at floor opening — hole or opening in floor/deck without standard railing or cover
Worker at height without harness — person working above 6 feet with no fall arrest system visible
Harness not clipped in — worker wearing harness but lanyard is not connected to anchor point
Improper ladder use — ladder unsecured, wrong angle, damaged, or worker overreaching from ladder
Missing scaffold guardrail/toprail — scaffold platform above 10 feet lacking top rail on open side
Missing scaffold midrail — scaffold guardrail system lacks required mid-rail between toprail and deck
Scaffold missing cross-bracing — scaffold frame lacks diagonal bracing needed for structural stability
Scaffold on unstable base — scaffold legs placed on soft ground, uneven surface, or without base plates and mudsills
Scaffold planks with gaps — working platform has gaps greater than 1 inch between planks or between plank and uprights
Unprotected trench edges — excavation/trench deeper than 4 feet without shoring, sloping, or shielding
No barricade around excavation — open excavation lacking guardrails, fencing, or barrier to prevent falls
Spoil pile too close to trench — excavated soil placed within 2 feet of trench edge creating surcharge load
Missing ladder for trench egress — trench over 4 feet deep without ladder or ramp within 25 feet of workers
Exposed wiring — live electrical conductors or wiring without insulation, covers, or junction boxes
Damaged extension cord — cord with cut insulation, exposed copper, missing ground prong, or taped splices
Missing GFCI protection — portable tools or temporary wiring without ground-fault circuit interrupter
Crane load without tag lines — suspended load being moved without tag/guide ropes to control swing
Equipment operating without spotter — heavy machinery reversing or operating in blind spots with no signal person
Debris on walkways — construction debris, scrap, tools, or hoses creating tripping hazards in travel paths
Improperly stacked materials — lumber, pipes, or supplies stacked without chocking, too high, or leaning
Protruding nails — boards or formwork with exposed nails or screws in walkways or work areas
Fire extinguisher missing or obstructed — required extinguisher absent from hot work area or access path blocked
Hot work without fire watch — welding, cutting, or grinding performed with no fire watch personnel or blanket
Compressed gas cylinders unsecured — oxygen, acetylene, or propane cylinders stored upright without chains or racks
Missing safety signage — hazard area lacks required warning, danger, or caution signs
Unbarricaded hazard zone — active hazard area without cones, tape, fencing, or physical barriers to restrict entry
